title: rubus subelegans
intro: Rubus subelegans, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus subelegans include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
